title: The Land of Sound
subtitle: Makassar, 2025
description: Taken at F8 Festival 2025, a massively public event featuring renowned artists, this frame captures more than just a live performance. Under a sea of crimson light, the stage becomes more than just a place for performance. It turns into a shared pulse between artist and audience. Each figure stands not only as a musician, but as a storyteller, expressing emotion through sound and movement. The chaos of the crowd in the foreground contrasts with the unity on stage, capturing a fleeting moment where individuality fades into collective energy. This frame holds more than a concert. It preserves the intensity of a night where music becomes memory, and the stage transforms into a space where sound feels almost tangible.

title: Flora
subtitle: Surabaya, 2025
description: Taken at Imlek PSMTI 2025 in Surabaya, an event celebrating Chinese New Year through traditional performances and vibrant decorations, this frame captures a moment where culture is brought to life on stage. Dressed in intricate attire, the performer stands as a bridge between heritage and expression, carrying tradition through voice and presence. The warm tones and detailed surroundings create a sense of richness, while the soft stage lighting adds a layer of intimacy to the scene. More than just a performance, this image reflects a celebration of identity, where every movement and note becomes a continuation of culture, preserved through time and shared with the present.

title: Warmness Within
subtitle: Surabaya, 2025
description: Taken at AoG Freedom Event in Surabaya, an event dedicated to guiding teens toward personal restoration and growth, this frame captures a quiet yet meaningful moment behind the scenes. Before the lights fully take over, connection happens in its simplest form. A smile, a gesture, and a shared interaction become the foundation of something greater than the event itself. The contrast between the technical setup in the foreground and the warmth of human interaction highlights the unseen side of every gathering. More than preparation, this image reflects sincerity and intention, where genuine connection becomes the true core of the experience.

title: Togetherness Forever
subtitle: Surabaya, 2023
description: Taken during a school retreat of MIMI School in Surabaya, 2023, this frame captures a quiet moment shaped by friendship and shared time. Beneath the filtered sunlight and surrounded by nature, two figures walk side by side, moving forward without urgency. The path ahead feels open, while the light behind them softly holds the memories they carry. More than just a walk, this image reflects the simplicity of togetherness, where presence becomes meaningful, and fleeting moments turn into something that lingers far beyond the frame.

title: Beautiful in Ordinary
subtitle: Surabaya, 2024
description: Taken in Surabaya, 2024, this frame captures a quiet moment drawn from everyday life. Behind the glass display, simple choices unfold in silence, guided by instinct rather than urgency. The soft natural light and warm tones create a sense of calm, turning an ordinary interaction into something worth noticing. More than just a daily routine, this image reflects how beauty often exists in unnoticed moments, where stillness, detail, and presence come together to form something quietly meaningful.

title: Songs of Worship
subtitle: Makassar, 2025
description: Captured in the heart of Makassar in 2025, this monochrome frame strips away the distraction of color to reveal the raw, spiritual gravity of a "Songs of Worship" gathering. The composition highlights a moment of profound surrender, where the stage ceases to be a platform for performance and becomes a sanctuary of collective devotion. Through a deliberate interplay of deep shadows and piercing highlights, the image emphasizes the physical expression of faith—extended arms and closed eyes that bridge the gap between the terrestrial and the divine. It is a visual testament to the power of shared belief, documenting not just an event, but a fleeting atmosphere where music transcends melody to become a vessel for the soul's deepest resonance.

title: Prime Glutton
subtitle: Surabaya, 2024
description: Set against the golden warmth of a Surabaya afternoon, this frame captures more than just a meal; it documents a ritual of connection. The steam rising from the bowls and the vibrant, honeyed light hitting the table transform a simple picnic into a cinematic feast for the senses. In this space, the act of sharing food becomes a dialogue—a moment where the rush of the city fades into the background, replaced by the intimacy of shared time and flavor. It is a visual celebration of indulgence, highlighting the textures and colors that turn a gathering into a memory, and proving that the best stories are often told over the simplest of tables.

title: In the Headspace
subtitle: Makassar, 2025
description: This frame serves as a raw observation of total immersion, capturing the precise moment where the boundary between physical presence and digital consciousness dissolves. By isolating the subject within a tight vertical composition, the image emphasizes the weight of a singular focus—a state of being so absolute that the immediate reality is entirely discarded. The headset acts as more than a tool; it is a sensory barrier that facilitates a deep dive into the 'now,' where the external world becomes a distant echo. It is a cinematic study of being truly "in the headspace" documenting the profound, solitary transition of a person who has momentarily traded the tangible world for a manufactured truth.

title: Better than One
subtitle: Makassar, 2026
description: This frame beautifully encapsulates the symbiotic nature of creation. It is a cinematic documentation of shared intellect, where two distinct minds converge over a complex mosaic of raw components. The central composition focuses on the physical dialogue of collaboration: four hands navigating an intricate dance of building and problem-solving. Through a soft, observational depth of field, the surrounding room fades away, leaving only the palpable energy of shared focus and the silent, unspoken trust required to build something complex together. It is a visual celebration of synergy, proving that the architecture of innovation is rarely a solitary endeavor, but a shared structure where two views see better than one.

title: For the Music, Life is a Canvas
subtitle: Makassar, 2026
description: This frame captures a harmonious conversion of performance and visual poetry. The low-key lighting and retro, grainy texture transform a modern gig into a timeless tableau. Standing with his silver guitar against a backdrop of flowing fairy lights, the central figure embodies the narrative: that every chord is a stroke of paint on an intangible canvas. He is a conductor of emotion, a painter who uses sound instead of color. The vertical orientation strips away the chaotic periphery to focus entirely on this creative dialogue. It is a visual celebration of artistry, proving that for those who live through sound, life is not a fixed path but an open, evolving masterpiece.

title: Lotus Europa S
subtitle: Makassar, 2026
description: This frame captures the visual synthesis of performance and environment. Standing with poise amidst a scene of mundane urban traffic, the Lotus Europa S becomes more than just a car; it is a disruptive, dynamic element. The low-profile silhouette and deep black finish emphasize its distinct DNA, a purposeful engineering designed to slice through air with precision. Through a wide-angle lens, the ordinary asphalt parking lot is transformed into a momentary stage, highlighting the visual isolation of speed and power. It is a cinematic study of automotive grace, proving that true art isn't always stationary, but sometimes, a fleeting moment of movement on four wheels.
